title: picoCTF Writeup | Dear Diary
author: Rvexrie
description: A digital forensics challenge where focused on hidden artifacts, espescially inode journal

title: HTB Writeup | Variatype
author: Rvexrie
description: This machine focuses on the Supply Chain and Dependency risk. It simulates how outdated tools like fonttools and fontforge can become critical weak points. The path to root is particularly educational, highlighting a common pitfall in Python's os.path.join() function where unsanitized user input can lead to arbitrary file writes in sensitive directories like /root/.ssh
